item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 032200Z AUTO 35003KT 320V040 9999 ///CB 14/13 Q1012 TEMPO 4000 TSRA
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 032103Z 0321/0418 24005KT 9999 SCT025 BECMG 0321/0324 VRB02KT TEMPO 0321/0406 VRB10KT SHRA SCT040CB PROB40 TEMPO 0321/0324 4000 TSRA PROB40 TEMPO 0403/0406 BKN008 TEMPO 0412/0418 4000 SHRA SCT025CB PROB30 TEMPO 0414/0418 2000 TSRA SCT025CB
